keyRotation.note: For key rotation, generate new keys and update JWT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
steps: 1. Generate new key pair: npm run generate-keys
2. Update JWT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH to new private key
3. Keep old public key available for existing token verification
4. Update client packages with new public key
5. Gradually phase out old tokens over 30 days

multipleKids.note: To support multiple key IDs (kid) in JWT header:
multipleKids.implementation: Add 'kid' to JWT header and maintain key map in server
